schema.name: CiscoMerakiAirMarshalEvents_CL
schema.description: The CiscoMerakiAirMarshalEvents table contains wireless security events including rogue access point detections, containment information, and Air Marshal scan results from Cisco Meraki networks.

columns.name: Bssids
columns.description: Array of BSSID objects with containment and detection information.

columns.name: Channels
columns.description: Array of channels where the SSID was detected.

columns.name: FirstSeen
columns.description: Timestamp when the rogue AP was first detected.

columns.name: LastSeen
columns.description: Timestamp when the rogue AP was last detected.

columns.name: WiredMacs
columns.description: Array of detected wired MAC addresses.

columns.name: WiredLastSeen
columns.description: Timestamp when the wired connection was last seen.

columns.name: NetworkId
columns.description: Network ID where the Air Marshal event was detected.
